Support Type of primary caregiver assistance: psychosocial support. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Spaces = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
M0380_CA_UK (M0380) Unknown Primary Caregiver Assistance Type of primary caregiver assistance: unknown. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Spaces = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
M0390_VISION (M0390) Vision Vision with corrective lenses if the patient usually wears them. 00 = Normal vision; sees adequately in most situations; can see medication labels, newsprint.
01 = Partially impaired; cannot see medication
